channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Unsafe pavement edge after recent resurfacing works, 11th March
item.description:
Conway recently resurfaced a section of pavement outside my property. However, it appears the work has been left incomplete or incorrectly finished. The new tarmac surface ends directly at the edge of the road without any kerb stones or proper edging like there used to be. As a result, the tarmac simply drops off at the corner into the road. This is not a proper pavement finish and is likely to deteriorate quickly as there is nothing supporting the edge. It also creates a poor and potentially unsafe transition between the pavement and the road. Could you please inspect this section of pavement and confirm whether the work has been completed correctly or if kerbs/edging are still due to be installed?

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lamp post has no power, 11th March
item.description:
Hi, Please could you investigate a power outage on TfL Asset ID 8801381 which has 3UK cell HKY199N05 attached. Our field engineering team have visited the site and confirmed there is no power to the DNO. Eastings 533218.355/ Northings 182407.755 Thank you
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlotte Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: I reported this yesterday ref 9083581 litter bins not emptied, 11th March
item.description:
Ref 9083581 reported this yesterday. I have had an email to say the problem has been sorted and closed. The rubbish bins and street have not been touched so cannot possibly think why this report has been closed. As previously mentioned our regular sweeper is not been here. We have had nobody down the street sweeping/emptying bins although we have noticed somebody with a Southwark council uniform sitting in the grounds of St Peter’s Church and am not sure if he is the person who has be assigned to do it.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Liverpool Grove, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter inside the metal fences ///trail.faster.spout, 11th March
item.description:
Litter on the other side of the metal fences. There is a metal door to access the area. Location ///trail.faster.spout
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Ledrington Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Danger items in carriageway, 11th March
item.description:
Large items in carriageway

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 114, Church Road, Upper Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Brambles and litter, 11th March
item.description:
The council has cut the brambles back further down the road and there is not litter but have not cut back opposite houses around no 74. We now have lots of litter that is dumped from cars and get stuck in brambles, the council did not cut this part of the road and we do not know why. This part of the road is looking real messy. Could someone clear this please.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hyde Vale, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress dumped, 11th March
item.description:
Mattress dumped on estate land

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Huguenot Square, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rotating cone under pedestrian button turning too slow, 11th March
item.description:
The rotating cone is turning too slowly meaning its very difficult for a blind person to know when its safe to cross. Could it be checked and made to turn faster at normal speed?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 83, Valette Street, Hackney, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of potholes, 11th March
item.description:
Lots of potholes
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Haseltine Road, Perry Vale, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Vehicle not taxed and declared SORN, 11th March
item.description:
Parked on Prescott Avenue most weekends this Volkswagen Tiguan is not road taxed and has been declared SORN by the owner it’s about time action was taken to remove such vehicles from our streets so law abiding citizens can use the roads we pay for. The post code of the location is BR51AF
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Faringdon Avenue, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly Tipping, 11th March
item.description:
Unwanted household goods are often put on pavement outside of this property. This metal, rusty shoe rack has been in situ for several weeks. The property is next to the Humber Road allotments.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Humber Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 11th March
item.description:
Nearby building sites are constantly fly tipping. We just had some removed this morning and have mew waste by the afternoon. Broken glass and tiles

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Queen Elizabeths Close, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Entire junction covered in potholes - life threatening for cyclists, 11th March
item.description:
This whole junction is covered in potholes and very unsafe for cyclists to cross - potentially life threatening as a cyclist could easily fall down and be injured or killed by traffic. I have had very many close passes as a result of trying to avoid these potholes. Needs dealing with urgently.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Peckham Rye, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish and cans, 11th March
item.description:
Been here for at least a month Looks terrible Windus Road always has bins overflowing Fly tipping also a problem

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Windus Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped electric fan, 11th March
item.description:
Fan dumped.. been there a few days

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Greenways, Beckenham, Greater London

item.title: Terrible Road Conditions, 11th March

item.title: Road failing, 11th March
item.description:
A large pothole is forming on Bexley High Street outside number 101. Could an engineer look?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 101, Bexley High Street, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Deep pothole on car park junction, 11th March
item.description:
Hard to take a good photo. It’s deep and cars can't avoid as the road is narrow. Given how fast vehicles come along at night at times, it could pose a risk.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mill Row, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
